problems.cause: Signal flow guarantee incorrectly equates output to input; should relate output to source subcomponent port, but subcomponent ports are not visible in component type contract.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove guarantee "route_C1" and "route_C2"; no valid AGREE expression can relate v_acc1_dataout to acc1_input without referencing subcomponent ports, which are forbidden in component type annexes.

executor_steps: Delete the entire annex agree {** ... **}; block from acc_hm_process (component type) since it incorrectly references input ports as direct sources of output ports.

Add an implementation-level annex agree block to acc_hm_process.impl with assign statements that bind v_acc1_dataout to acc_HM.acc1_validated_dataout and v_acc2_dataout to acc_HM.acc2_validated_dataout, assuming those subcomponent ports are visible in the implementation scope.
Verify that acc_HM.acc1_validated_dataout and acc_HM.acc2_validated_dataout are declared as out ports in acc_HM.impl, and that the connections C1 and C2 exist (they do per AADL context).
Do not reintroduce any component type-level guarantees referencing subcomponent ports, as AGREE forbids such references in component type contracts.
